summary: Iteration 25: Interdiction Planner Enhancements - Complete verification of per-route timing analysis, escape analysis, multi-snare suggestion, nearby POI warnings, tactical notes, quick-add origin presets, Your QD/Target QD selectors, clear button, and enhanced results display. Backend 20/20 pytest tests passed (100%). Frontend all new interdiction features verified working correctly via Playwright.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (span inside option/select/optgroup) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Backend star_systems.py calculate_interdiction() returns comprehensive tactical data
Per-route timing includes target_travel_time_s and time_to_snare_s correctly calculated
Escape analysis uses QD_SPEEDS dictionary to compare speeds between your_qd_size and target_qd_size
Tactical notes are context-aware: warns about nearby comm arrays, stations, coverage gaps
Multi-snare suggestion (_find_second_snare) correctly identifies best position for second QED
Frontend RoutePlanner.jsx InterdictionResults component properly displays all new data sections
Canvas renders covered routes in green and uncovered in red with crosshair on primary snare
Quick-add preset buttons use addOriginsByType() to bulk add origins by location type
React hydration warnings (span inside select/option) are from development tooling, not bugs
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - Uses existing star system data from star_systems.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 verified interdiction planner enhancements. Key features: (1) your_qd_size/target_qd_size params in POST /api/routes/interdiction, (2) route_details array with per-route timing (target_travel_time_s, time_to_snare_s, covered, deviation_mkm), (3) escape_analysis with can_escape, speed comparison, and note, (4) tactical_notes array with context-aware tips, (5) nearby_pois array with locations near snare, (6) timing object with arrival_times and window info, (7) second_snare suggestion when coverage < 100%. Frontend has preset buttons (+Cities, +Stations, +R&R), QD selectors, clear button, and comprehensive results panels (route breakdown, arrival timeline, escape analysis, tactical intel, nearby locations).

feature_verification_summary.per_route_timing_analysis: PASS - route_details contains target_travel_time_s and time_to_snare_s
feature_verification_summary.escape_analysis: PASS - Shows can_escape, your_speed_kms, target_speed_kms, speed_diff_kms, note
feature_verification_summary.nearby_poi_warnings: PASS - nearby_pois array with stations/moons/planets near snare
feature_verification_summary.tactical_notes: PASS - Context-aware tips about comm arrays, stations, coverage gaps
feature_verification_summary.quick_add_presets: PASS - +Cities, +Stations, +R&R Stops buttons add origins by type
feature_verification_summary.qd_selectors: PASS - Your QD (S1/S2/S3) and Target QD (S1/S2/S3) selectors work
feature_verification_summary.clear_button: PASS - Clears all interdiction selections and results
feature_verification_summary.route_breakdown_table: PASS - Shows per-route details with covered/uncovered status
feature_verification_summary.arrival_timeline: PASS - Shows timing window and arrival bars
feature_verification_summary.canvas_visualization: PASS - Covered routes green, uncovered red, crosshair on snare
